characters.name: Pointless Sisters
characters.description:
Pointless Sisters(Mippuruin KNT) is a girl group formed byPolly EstherandLucille. The group formations and first appearance were inSinging Samurai Sensai-tionwhen a manager, Charlie Bird told the girls he can make them big stars. They agreed to participate and have formed a Pointless Sisters group. They were a very popular group inLittle Tokyo. Later in the episode, it is revealed that Charlie Bird is actually a dressedBad Birdand while the girls were singing, they were transmitting hypnotic energy waves mixed with the subliminal messages. That madeLittle Tokyocitizens enslave themselves in the robots' feet thus becoming a moving force. That madePollyvery angry. Together withGeneral Cattonthey have freed the citizens andSpeedyhas destroyed the robots.
The Pointless Sisters was forgotten after that.PollyandLucillewere sad about it.SpeedyandGuidotried to cheer them up. However, it didn't work forLucille- she really missed the Pointless Sisters group and that made her fire missiles out of her hairdo. The Pointless Sisters appeared inCandid Kitty. Later, inNo Talent Guido, Polly and Lucille tried to revive the Pointless Sisters.

characters.name: Princess Vi's Servant
characters.description: Princess Vi's Servantis a KangarooAnimaloidworks for theMecha Edo Castle. She often bears the most suffering out ofPrincess Vi's outbursts to the point she can sometimes predict how Vi will react as inField of Screwballs.She has occasionally been sent toPrisonerandExtras Island(justPrisoner Islandin KNT) as well, though she always comes back. Princess Vi: Vi's servant acts as a voice of reason for the Princess, trying to get her to focus on her studies or reel in her own emotions. She often tries to hide her real thoughts on the Princess such as thinking no sane guy would want to date her, only for Vi to find out.

characters.name: Ruby
characters.description: Ruby(オキン,Okinu)is a red-headed girl who first appears inKind of a Drag. She is a dress designer who made a dress for theBig Cheese's niece (which later turns out was for him). She is near-sighted and needs glasses. The Big Cheese thought she caught him wearing the dress and he sends his henchmen to kill her, but the Pizza Cats stop them and the Big Cheese later realizes about her sight condition.Guidofalls in love with her at first sight, until he found out she already had a boyfriend, leaving Guido heartbroken. She later has a cameo inField of Screwballs.

characters.name: Time Master
characters.description: Time Master(トキオカケル4号,Tokiokakeru #4) is the villain of the day for the episodeSamurai Savings Time. He is a living time machine.

characters.name: Time Master
characters.description: Time Master(トキオカケル4号,Tokiokakeru #4) is the villain of the day for the episodeSamurai Savings Time. He is a living time machine.

characters.name: Tokugawa Tunabreath
characters.description: Tokugawa Tunabreath(徳川ツナサラダ,Tokugawa Tsunasarada) was a former shogun ofLittle Tokyo, referenced in the episodeUnderground, Underwater, Undercooked. According to the narrator, Tunabreath was notorious for his obsession with seafood, particularly freshly caught fish. His obsession eventually became so fanatical that he issued a royal decree, which forbade his subjects from eating his favorite food. As the people of Little Tokyo began to complain, Tunabreath issued even more stringent laws; forbidding the catching of fish without a royal license or keeping fish as pets. This forced the citizens of Little Tokyo to return their fish to the sea or risk the wrath of Tunabreath's "Fish Police". Eventually, all the fish in the kingdom were rounded up and locked away in a giant water-filled vault deep beneath the city. Sometime later, Tunabreath was, ironically, eaten by a giant grouper after falling overboard while on a fishing trip. Tunabreath's vault was sealed shortly after his death and remained forgotten untilBad Birdrediscovered the ancient map in the royal library. The map revealed the location of the vault and its fortune contained sayin, "gold ____", with the second word been scratched off. This led Bad Bird to believe that the fortune was actually gold, only to discover to his horror upon opening the vault that the missing word was, in fact, "Fish".
